titleStmt.title: SII 15.45: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 45. (B.K. Nos. 20 and 21 of 1929-30.) HANDARGAL, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing in the ruined Saṅgamēśvara temple.

The epigraph describes the king's subordinate Kumāra Hemmāḍi of the Yādava lineage who is praised for his great valour and is said to have won in 108 battles. A trustworthy subordinate of this maṇḍalika Hemmāḍi was Tantrapāla Toṇḍarasa. Toṇḍarasa had a brother named Bammarasa whose wife was Bāgiyabbe. The inscription registers a gift of land to Trikūṭālaya probably by Toṇḍarasa.

The supplement at the end which seems to belong to a slightly later date registers a gift of garden and oil to the god Svayaṁbhu Toṇḍēśvara. It mentions Chikka-Bommayya, son of Tantrapāla Toṇḍarasa and refers to Sōmayya as having conquered Toṇḍayya and established the kingdom of the Sēvuṇas (i.e. the Yādavas). Āchārya Sarvēśvarapaṇḍita, disciple of Āneyadēva, received this gift. This supplement coMmencing with line 52 is treated as a separate record in the Annual Report for the year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayanti sthāyinasaṁcāribhāvābhinayabhāvakāḥ . nīlalōhitaśailūṣabhrūlatā lāsyavibhramāḥ .
namastuṁgaśireścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paremabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatu pratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadēkamalla dēvare vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatpāda padmōpajīvi sama
stapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jagadēkamalladēvara kaṭṭidalagu kumāraṁ hemmā
ḍi dēvarasaru . vri . Uṟadaranikki bīrasiriyaṁ sale sajjanavi¨rddhana¨rtthigaḷaṁ naṟeyade maṇḍaḷēsvarare yā
cakarāgire koṭṭu cāgavaṁ niṟisidanātmakī¨rttivadhu hālgaḍaloḷu jaḷakēḷiyāḍe kaṇḍeṟasidanendū
ḍē vogaḷvudunnatiyaṁ kali hemmabhūpana . © hiḍuganaḍu¨rttu huydasitagaṁ kaṭakaṁ kavi kalleyāgi
kūgiḍaliṟidāvadoṭṭeysi banda paṭaṁ ripucakramaṁ paḍalvaḍisida ga¨rvvadubbarada sāsiganī nereyoḍagaṁḍanīraḍe
yoḷadeṁntuvēṁ bhujabaḷōnnatarē nagaḷdanya bhūbhujar . nuḍidude nanni nōḍidude maṁgaḷavittude tāṁbraśāsanaṁ naḍe
dude sādhyaviḷduda jayāpahavendude pūṇke saṁgaraṁ baḍedude saypugelsaledhanīṁ jasada¨rtthiye vritti lī
leyiṁ piḍidude pe¨rccu vibhuvikramame sauṣṭhavavī nereyoḍe gaṇḍane . taleyaṁ koṭṭava nātanā vaneṇipēṁ yuddhakke tāvaṁji bā
ḷdaleyaṁ tettavanāvaneṇipēṁ dō¨rgga¨rbbamaṁ biṭṭu kōṭalevaldāḍidarāra nāvanaṟiveṁ nūṟeṁṭu saṁgrāma
maṁ sale geldekkala vīrenā¨rggavariyaṁ pe¨rmmāḍibhopāḷakaṁ . kaṁ . sariyu mu millana dētaradiṁ nūṟeṁṭu samaradūḷ
jayamaṁ bittarisidanendaḍe kēḷdaccarivaḍadavaroḷare pe¨rmmanripa vikramama . va . Antu Abhaṁganātha kṣetriyaneni
si neṟe negaḷtegaṁ pogaḷtegaṁ neleyāda maṁḍaḷikanārāyaṇaṁ gōmana ha¨rmmāḍidēva nantātana vijayarājyakke . ka .
© tāne modalenisi negaḷduddāniyoḷā he¨rmmanripana naccina jayasaṁsthānakara kaṭṭida laganadanaṟiyire taṁtrahāḷanaṁ toṁḍamana . cāḷukya cakrava
¨rttigaḷoḷāvuda kaṭṭidalagu hemmāḍi mahīpāḷakanātana vijeyaśrīlīlege kaṭṭi dalagidenipaṁ toṁḍa . vri . tanagāḷvala nereyoḍegaṁḍa
mahipaṁ hemmāḍibhūpāḷakaṁ janavandyaṁ jasakaṁ guṇāḍhyanudayādityaṁ mahatpuṇya maṁghanateyiṁ bhūnuta jakkiya
bbarasiyandaṁ daṇnaseypiṁge ḷnōntavarāro bhāvisuvaḍiṁtī taṁtrapāḷaṁbara . ka . nāḍiṁ ḍiya
tāne diṭake mānasanenipī roḍhi mige dhātrisale koṁḍāḍuvudī taṁtrahāḷanaṁ toṁḍa mana . [va .] Antenisi negaḷda taṁtrahāḷatoṁ
ḍamarasaṁganujātanāgiyuṁ guṇāgrajātanuvabhirūpanuṁ prakhyātanumenisi . vri . vinayamanappukeydu nuḍi bhāvadoḷoṁdida citta
gaḷuṁ nene koneyāgutippa vibhavaṁ sale sajjanavāgalakṣmi neṭṭana dorevetti mānasike raṁjise taṁnnoḷudāttapuṇyamaṁḍananenisidaṁ ba¨rmmara
sanaṁte kritā¨rtthare mikkamānavar . ḷaṁgitanā jaya bhujōccaṁḍa kauṣēyaka bittaradiṁdiṁtī
tanaṇnaṁgeraḍaneya tanu trāṇana¨rtthi brajakkādaradiṁdiṁtī ttaṁ cittanidhi nijavaṁśāṁbujakkītanā bhāskaranendeṁdi
ttaluṁ bammarasananolaviṁ baṇnikuṁ bhūvibhāga . hridayame rasaga dha¨rmma vinōde jakkiyabbarasi puṭṭidanene ba
mmarasanavōlnōṁta manujanāvaṁ dhareyoḷ . va . Intu negartevetta bammarasaṁga¨rddhāṁganivā siniyenisi . vri . nayavatiyendu rūpa
vatiyendu yaśōvatiyendu puṇyasaṁśrayavatiyendu satyavatiyendu dayāvatiyendu vallabhapriyavatiyendu bhāgyava
tiyendu bhōgyavatiyandu jagaṁ pogaḷalke sadguṇaikadayavati bāgiyabbarasi bammarasaṁganukūle va¨rttipaḷu [.] vina
moḷpuṁ bhāgyamavinituṁ tanagēkabhōgavene bammarasaṁganukūle bāgiyabbarasi nitāṁ� lakṣmiyante vakṣadoḷippa[ḷu .]
nirupamapuṇyarūparivarādaradiṁ samasandu muṁnne ni śivayōgadiṁ ḍa¨rcida siddhaliṁgamaṁ sthi
ravene kaṁḍu dha¨rmmaratiyinde tadīya nivāsamaṁ manōharamanapū¨rvvamaṁ paḍedu māḍisi dha¨rmmada trikū
ṭame . © siri niṭṭeyaltu dha¨rmmave paramadhanaṁ bagevaḍenisi sale dha¨rmmasya tvaritā gati yeṁbi danādarisi
yene māḍisidarī trikūṭālayama . Oḍaloḍava heṁḍireṁbavaroḍevāradu puṇyarū
paveṁbive puruṣaṁgoḍavappuveṁndu māḍidareḍeyuḍugade bhaktiyiṁ trikūṭālayama . Antu
tammutanibaruṁ māḍisida śrī trikūṭālayakke pūjepunaskārakke naḍavantāgi tammaguḍḍe mā
nyada sthaḷadoḷage modala bhāgadalu biṭṭa keymattaru haṁneraḍu . I dha¨rmmavaṁ pratipāḷisi
dava¨rgge kurukṣētradalu A¨rgghyatītthadalu śrī vāraṇāśiyalu dibyatapō
dhana¨rggaṁ sahasrabhōjanavanikkida phalavidanāvanō¨rvvaṁ pāpaka¨rmmanaḷihiṁda
dvēṣadiṁda kiḍisidanavaṁ ghōranarakā¨rṇnavakke gaḷagaḷanippattondu taleyahitararoḷa
gāgi yiḷivaru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapē
tamanasō bhuvi bhūmipāḷāḥ yē pālayaṁti mama dha¨rmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ
mayā racitamaṁjaḷirēṣa mū¨rdhni . jayatyābrahmasaṁkētaṁ sākṣādabyaktabōdhakaṁ sa
tśabdavācyaṁ talliṁgamakhaṁḍānandabudbudaṁ . jayanti piyūṣakaṇā
nkirantyaḥ manōrathaprēmarasānduhantyaḥ samastalōkē prativa¨rttayantya(ḥ) ssamagra
vācaḥ kavipuṁgavānāṁ . satkavipramukhāṁbhōjasaṁbhūtā hi sarasvatī
jagadraṁgē līlālāsyaṁ manōharaṁ . kiṁ stuvē vaikharīṁ vāṇīṁ yayā saṁ
tēja kiṁ stuvē sāpi yatrāsīttatkavīṁdra mukhāṁbujaṁ . janmāntara sahasrē bhyō yatsaṁ
sāramahatsukhaṁ tatsa¨rvvaṁ satkavīṁdrēbhya(ḥ) ssūktigamyamudāhritaṁ . namaśśivāya .
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ nerevoḍegaṁ
heṁmāḍidēvarasara kaṭṭidalagu taṁtrapāḷa toṁṇḍaresana magaṁ cikkabrammayya
dēvarasaṁnōḍalu sōmayya toṁḍayyanaṁ geldu sēvuṇa rājyavaṁ nilisi halabara kondu
śrīsvayaṁbhu toṁḍēsvaradēvara maṭhadācā¨ryyarānayadēvara śiṣya sa¨rvvēsvarapaṁḍita¨rgge hanne
dha¨rmma kāreya māṟakoṁḍavaralli vi 5 koṭṭaru soṁṭige yeṇne
